summary: Comprehensive mobile side panel testing for FaceConnect app. All side panel features working correctly - panels open via button clicks and edge swipes, close via X button and backdrop tap. Bottom navigation is fixed and functional. Navigation between pages works. Touch interactions work. No critical mobile bugs found.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection closes immediately - may affect real-time features in production
Returns 404 - stories feed endpoint may not be implemented

issues: Panel content appears with backdrop blur but panel modal itself renders correctly as centered modal

passed_tests: Left panel opens via button click (data-testid='open-left-panel-btn')
Left panel opens via left edge swipe (from x=10 to x=200)
Left panel closes via X button (data-testid='left-panel-back-btn')
Left panel closes via backdrop tap
Settings popup opens from left panel
Right panel opens via button click (data-testid='open-right-panel-btn')
Right panel opens via right edge swipe (from x=390 to x=200)
Right panel closes via X button (data-testid='right-panel-back-btn')
Right panel closes via backdrop tap
Create New Post popup opens from right panel
Bottom navigation is visible and fixed (data-testid='mobile-bottom-nav')
Create menu opens from bottom nav create button
Z-index layering correct (panels above content, bottom nav visible)
Scroll containers properly configured with overflow: auto
critical_code_review_comments: SwipeablePanels.jsx correctly implements edge swipe detection (within 30px of edges)
Panels render as centered modals with backdrop blur (z-index: 99-100)
BottomNav.jsx uses React Portal to render outside transform context
index.css has proper mobile scroll settings (touch-action: pan-y, overflow-y: auto)
Home.jsx implements infinite scroll and pull-to-refresh correctly
PostHog analytics throws error on touch events but this is third-party issue, not app bug
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile side panel functionality is fully working. Panels open as centered modals (not sliding side panels) with backdrop blur. Edge swipe detection works within 30px of screen edges. Bottom navigation uses React Portal to escape transform context. All navigation works. The PostHog analytics library throws errors on touch events but this is a third-party issue. Test user testrefactor1@test.com with token N5bO_EanvJ4pcKA22nn8jOQ1xxHFZW0mpX2YOw2fE8k can be used for future testing. Mobile viewport tested: 400x800.
mocked_apis_note: Watch, Marketplace, Gaming, Memories return mock data as per previous iteration notes
